'''Hettsk''' was a [[New Republic/Legends|New Republic]] world located in the [[Trans-Hydian/Legends|Borderland Regions]]. It was [[Battle of Hettsk|conquered]] by [[Galactic Empire/Legends|Imperial]] forces during the [[Thrawn campaign]]. It was also the location of a successful [[Mission to Hettsk|rescue mission]] undertaken by [[Katarn Commandos|Page's Commandos]].<ref name="CM" />

==Appearances==
*{{WEGCite|story=Commando Mission|book=Heir to the Empire Sourcebook|reprint=1}}
